meaning: adj.经久不衰的,无穷尽的,可靠的
examples: She fought the disease with unfailing good humour.
Everyone admired her patience and unfailing good humour.
He had the unfailing care and support of Erica, his wife.
Now these horses, for all their high character and unfailing common sense, are remarkably dreary creatures.
Even a short visit unfailing impresses one with the country's human and natural resources.
